breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Lebanon, Israel and U.S. sign trilateral framework pact
breaking.summary: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said that they had attacked U.S. sites in the Gulf region in retaliation to American strikes in Iran

breaking.title: Death, dust and desperation: Venezuela's twin earthquakes leave nearly 1,000 dead, trail of despair- watch
breaking.summary: Venezuela reels from twin earthquakes, with the death toll tragically climbing to 920 and over 50,000 reported missing amidst widespread devastation. Rescue efforts are in full swing, with international aid pouring in from nations like the US and India, which launched Operation Amistad. The humanitarian crisis deepens, particularly for the millions of children affected, as the search for survivors continues under mountains of rubble.

breaking.title: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
breaking.summary: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.

breaking.title: U.S. and Iran trade strikes putting new strain on West Asia ceasefire
breaking.summary: U.S. Central Command said the military struck missile and drone locations and coastal radar sites in Iran

breaking.title: Utah declares state of emergency, restricts fireworks as U.S. largest wildfire grows
breaking.summary: The National Weather Service issued a rare “Particularly Dangerous Situation” warning as dry, windy conditions provided fuel for more fires across the western U.S.

breaking.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: "Violence Will Be Met With Violence," Says JD Vance As US Strikes Iran
breaking.summary: US-Iran War Live Updates: US, Iran signed a 14-point deal to end the war on June 17

breaking.title: Magnitude 6.5 quake hits off southern Philippines
breaking.summary: The 7.8-magnitude tremor that hit Mindanao on June 8 brought down buildings, triggered landslides and displaced thousands on the southern island, while also setting off tsunami warnings across the region

breaking.title: "Charlie’s bloody coat was returned to Erika": Candace Owens releases unseen SUV photos after Charlie Kirk's assassination, raises new questions
breaking.summary: Candace Owens has released previously unseen photos from the SUV that transported Charlie Kirk to the hospital after he was fatally shot, claiming they raise new questions about the events following the attack. She pointed to shattered glass, a blood-stained bag, and Kirk's damaged microphone, while questioning how evidence was handled. Owens also highlighted alleged inconsistencies in witness accounts. However, her claims remain her interpretation and have not been officially verified by investigators.
